# cp_supported_layouts_options

**Enumeration**

The options you can pass to functions that relate to rendering capabilities and layout support.

## Declaration

```swift
enum cp_supported_layouts_options : uint32_t;
```

## Overview

You can pass the enumeration’s cases to functions, including [doc://com.apple.compositorservices/documentation/CompositorServices/cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_supported_layout] and [doc://com.apple.compositorservices/documentation/CompositorServices/cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_supported_layouts_count].

## Enumeration Cases

- **cp_supported_layouts_options_foveation_enabled**
- **cp_supported_layouts_options_none**
- **cp_supported_layouts_options_progressive_immersion_enabled**

## Getting the supported layouts

- **cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_supported_layouts_count**: Returns the number of layouts the layer supports.
- **cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_supported_layout**: Returns the layout at the specified index in the layer capabilities.
